---
title: "SumForce"
generated: true
description: "Weighted sum of forces -- multi-metric within one stage."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.register`](../nitrix-register.qmd)

*Re-exported here; defined in `nitrix.register._force`.*

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:SumForce -->
```python
class SumForce
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:SumForce -->
Weighted sum of forces -- multi-metric within one stage.

The dense-field analogue of combining several metrics in a single
registration stage: `update` is $\sum_i w_i \cdot
\text{force}_i.\text{update}$ and `cost` the matching weighted sum, so
a *combination* of metrics drives one recipe with **no** driver change -- a
[`SumForce`](../nitrix-register/SumForce.qmd) is itself just another [`Force`](../nitrix-register/Force.qmd).  Each term is bound
once (its fixed-state hoisted) by `bind`; the terms may mix tiers
freely (e.g. a closed-form [`LNCCForce`](../nitrix-register/LNCCForce.qmd) plus a [`MIForce`](../nitrix-register/MIForce.qmd) for a
cross-modal-plus-structural drive).
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

### Methods

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:SumForce.bind -->
```python
bind(fixed: Float[Array, '*spatial'], *, ndim: int, rel_spacing: RelSpacing = None) -> _BoundSum
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

Bind every term to `fixed`, hoisting each term's fixed-state.

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:SumForce.__init__ -->
```python
__init__(terms: tuple[tuple[float, Force], ...]) -> None
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:SumForce -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `*spatial` | the spatial axes of a grid (variadic) |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
